records.rules: Reduce the MP cost for passing through any terrain of specialization by 1. However, this reduction may never lower movement costs below 1 MP.
Apply a –1 To-Hit Modifier for all attacks made into and/or through the terrain or environmental condition of specialization (to a minimum modifier of +0).
Receive a +1 Initiative roll modifier if the selected terrain or environment type covers at least half of the map area.
The force receives a +1 Initiative roll modifier when acting as the Attacker in a scenario of any type, but suffers a –1 Initiative roll modifier when acting as the Defender.
The force receives a +1 Initiative roll modifier when acting as the Defender in a scenario of any type, but suffers a –1 Initiative roll modifier when acting as the Attacker.
Receive a +1 Initiative roll modifier if the force is taking part in a specified scenario type. For all other scenario types, the force suffers a –1 Initiative roll modifier.
